name: Betway
scriptJson:
[
        {"type":"wait","time":3000},
        {"type":"click","selector":"button:has-text('Log in')","time":2000},
        {"type":"click","selector":"button:has-text('Sign in')","time":2000},
        {"type":"wait","time":2000},
        {"type":"click","selector":"input[name='username'], input[name='email'], input[type='tel']","time":1000},
        {"type":"input","selector":"input[name='username'], input[name='email'], input[type='tel']","value":"{{PHONE_NUMBER}}","time":1000},
        {"type":"click","selector":"input[name='password'], input[type='password']","time":1000},
        {"type":"input","selector":"input[name='password'], input[type='password']","value":"{{PASSWORD}}","time":1000},
        {"type":"wait","time":2000},
        {"type":"click","selector":"button[type='submit']","time":1000},
        {"type":"click","selector":"button.p-button-primary","time":1000},
        {"type":"click","selector":"button:has-text('Log in')","time":1000},
        {"type":"wait","time":8000}
    ]
failureKeywords: Access Denied. Check Username and/or Password
